titlStmt.titl: DDI description: Gustaf Alfred af Hällström: library and purchases of printed works 1845-1861
titlStmt.parTitl: DDI-kuvailu: Gustaf Alfred af Hällströmin kirjasto ja kirjaostot 1845-1861

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

titlStmt.titl: Gustaf Alfred af Hällström: library and purchases of printed works 1845-1861
titlStmt.parTitl: Gustaf Alfred af Hällströmin kirjasto ja kirjaostot 1845-1861

prodStmt.copyright: In accordance with the agreement between FSD and the depositor.

serInfo.p: Individual datasets that do not belong to any series.

citation.biblCit: Hakapää, Jyrki: Gustaf Alfred af Hällström: library and purchases of printed works 1845-1861 [dataset]. Data version 1.0 (2017-11-22). Finnish Social Science Data Archive [distributor]. DOI: https://doi.org/10.60686/t-fsd3208; URN: https://urn.fi/urn:nbn:fi:fsd:T-FSD3208

holdings.location: Finnish Social Science Data Archive FSD

abstract.p: This dataset comprises a list of printed works owned and purchased between 1845-1861 by Gustaf Alfred af Hällström (1827-1899), a landowner from Vihti and a member of the Diet of Finland. The data also include 44 photographs of the hand-written manuscripts which are archived in the National Library of Finland's archive for the noble families Gadolin and af Hällström.

The data specify each purchased and owned work along with information on the time of purchase, bibliographic information, price and quantity of volumes purchased, if the work had been purchased from an auction in Helsinki as well as if the work had disappeared from af Hällström's collection or if it had been donated to someone else.
The dataset is only available in Finnish.

sumDscr.universe: Gustaf Alfred af Hällström's list of book purchases from 1845-1861

sampProc.p: The data are based on the only known Finnish list of book purchases from the 19th century.

dataColl.resInstru: Data collection guidelines: Secondary data collection guide DataCollectionGuidelines.SecondaryDataCollectionGuide

sources.dataSrc: Gadolin-Hällström family archive. Coll. 57.78. The Manuscript Collection, the National Library of Finland.

method.stdyClas: Detailed and specific data description in Finnish and English. The data are checked and processed in detail. If necessary, the data are anonymised.

setAvail.collSize: 44 photographs in jpg format and 1 Excel table in ods format.

useStmt.restrctn: The dataset is (A) openly available for all users without registration (CC BY 4.0).
useStmt.citReq: The data and its creators shall be cited in all publications and presentations for which the data have been used. The bibliographic citation may be in the form suggested by the archive or in the form required by the publication.
useStmt.deposReq: Notify FSD of all publications where you have used the data by sending the citation information to user-services.fsd@tuni.fi.
useStmt.disclaimer: The original data creators and the archive bear no responsibility for any results or interpretations arising from the reuse of the data.

dataAccs.notes: Some clarifications were made in the Excel table at FSD.

othrStdyMat.relPubl:
Hakapää, Jyrki (2017). Tiedon ja kulttuurin tarpeet. Gustaf Alfred af Hällströmin kirjahankinnat 1845-1861. Teoksessa: Leivoksia, kaupunkilaisia ja sivistysaatteita. Kävelyretkiä Euroopan historiaan (toim. Aalto, Sari & Nyström, Samu & Peake, Rose-Marie), 34-48. Helsinki: Kirjapaja.
Tiedon ja kulttuurin tarpeet. Gustaf Alfred af Hällströmin kirjahankinnat 1845-1861
